paper.title_en: Elastic stiffness of three-dimensional black holes and wormholes from Liouville line defects
paper.abstract_en: We study elastic deformations of thin-shell black holes and wormholes in AdS$_3$ gravity. These geometries are sourced by line defects in the dual conformal field theory, and their shape and mass distribution define elastic moduli of the gravitational saddle. We compute the quadratic response of the partition function to these deformations, defining stiffness kernels for both transverse shape fluctuations and inhomogeneous mass-density fluctuations. The computation of the stiffness kernels can be realized as a hyperbolic response to a conformal welding problem which reduces to the universal Schwarzian response in the heavy-shell limit. The stiffness kernels are two-point functions of defect-local operators in CFT: the displacement operator, which measures the response to shape deformations, and a mass-density operator, which measures the response to local changes in the shell density. We compute the spectrum of these operators in the semiclassical limit, in various black hole and wormhole backgrounds. The spectrum can be discrete or continuous depending on the existence of a non-compact direction transverse to the shell in the geometry. We also provide a Lorentzian interpretation for the stiffness kernels using linear response theory and compute the relaxation time scales towards the corresponding transient deformations in the dual holographic CFT. Lastly, we compute the effect of these elastic deformations on black hole microstate statistics and black hole entropy.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文研究AdS3引力中薄壳黑洞和蛀洞的弹性变形，涉及双全息CFT中的线缺陷，计算刚度核，并讨论熵和微态统计，与黑洞热力学和全息凝聚态物理密切相关。
decision.title_zh: 来自刘维尔线缺陷的三维黑洞和蛀洞的弹性刚度
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了AdS$_3$引力中薄壳黑洞和蛀洞的弹性变形。这些几何结构由对偶共形场论中的线缺陷提供，其形状和质量分布定义了引力鞍点的弹性模量。我们计算了配分函数对这些变形的二次响应，定义了横向形状涨落和非均匀质量密度涨落的刚度核。刚度核的计算可以转化为共形焊接问题中的双曲响应，在重壳极限下简化为普遍的Schwarzian响应。刚度核是CFT中缺陷局域算符的两点函数：位移算符（测量对形状变形的响应）和质量密度算符（测量对壳密度局部变化的响应）。我们计算了在半经典极限下这些算符在各种黑洞和蛀洞背景中的谱。谱可以是离散的或连续的，取决于几何中是否存在垂直于壳的非紧致方向。我们还利用线性响应理论为刚度核提供了洛伦兹解释，并计算了双全息CFT中对应瞬态变形的弛豫时间尺度。最后，我们计算了这些弹性变形对黑洞微态统计和黑洞熵的影响。
